title: Waterlogging risk near low-lying junctions
summary: Heavy evening rain may slow commutes and cause short-term waterlogging in underpasses and market roads.

title: Coastal flood watch and rail delays
summary: Strong rainfall bands and high tide increase flooding risk in coastal stretches and may disrupt suburban travel.

title: Localized thunderstorm advisory
summary: Residents should secure loose objects, charge devices, and avoid unnecessary travel during peak showers.
